title: Friends Remover Mobile Edition
excerpt: Mobile Edition is coming soon alongside a major Unfriend History overhaul, improved stability, stronger security systems, performance upgrades, and major UI improvements.
body:
For almost a year, Friends Remover has been one of the many extensions used to manage Roblox friends on PC. While the extension already includes features like Unfriend History and background removals, we are now working toward a larger goal: mobile support.

This is where Friends Remover Mobile Edition comes in. We have been experimenting and are preparing a beta version for mobile devices.

Android
How it works:

1. Open the Play Store.
2. Search for "quetaa."
3. Install the app.
4. Open Chrome Web Store and search for "Friends Remover."
5. Click "Add to Chrome."

Mobile support will be available soon on Android, with iOS support planned afterward.

added.moreInfo: Redesigned settings UI for mobile devices.
Swipe left or right to switch between friends.
AFK warning now appears as a toast notification.
Unfriend History entries can now be dismissed.
Logo changes when Unfriend History is open.
Rate-limits sensitive actions and triggers CAPTCHA when needed.

fixed.moreInfo: Fixed history loading only local data instead of server data.
Fixed redirecting back to friends list.
Fixed missing avatars during CAPTCHA sessions.
Fixed inactive friend detection and background removal logic.

improved.moreInfo: Updated history UI to match friends compact view design.
Reduced options to only View Profile.
Background sync now waits for API recovery before applying changes.
CAPTCHA requirements scale based on action size.
Polling speed adapts to friend count.
Avatar quality scales with friend count for performance.
Reduces animations and avatar rendering load.

security.moreInfo: CAPTCHA added to more sensitive actions.
Prevents cancellation when fewer than 7 friends remain.

other.moreInfo: Uses header search button for to search through friends now.
Settings fully usable on mobile devices.
Added hamburger menu and sidebar navigation.
Toasts now slide from bottom instead of side.
